allow: Bash(http_proxy=http://127.0.0.1:7890 https_proxy=http://127.0.0.1:7890 nohup python -m open_rosalind.cli serve --port 6006)
Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:6006/api/analyze -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"question":"Find recent papers about CRISPR base editing in 2024"}')
Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:6006/api/analyze -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"question":"Find recent papers about CRISPR base editing in 2024"}' -o /tmp/r.json)
Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:6006/api/analyze -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"question":"Find recent papers about CRISPR base editing in 2024"}' -o /tmp/r2.json)
Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:6006/api/analyze -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"question":"Find recent papers about CRISPR base editing in 2024"}' -o /tmp/r3.json)
Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:6006/api/analyze -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"question":"Find recent papers about CRISPR base editing in 2024"}' -o /tmp/r4.json)
Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:6006/api/analyze -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"question":"What is BRCA1 and where is it located in the cell?"}' -o /tmp/r5.json)
Bash(git -c http.proxy=http://127.0.0.1:7890 -c https.proxy=http://127.0.0.1:7890 push -u origin main)
Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:6006/api/analyze -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"input":"asdfgh nonexistent xyzproteinquery","mode":"uniprot"}' -o /tmp/r_fb.json)
Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:6006/api/analyze -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"input":"Translate this DNA: ATGGCCAAATTAA"}' -o /tmp/pro05.json)
Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:6006/api/task/run -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"goal":"Find papers about CRISPR","max_steps":2}')
Bash(sqlite3 open_rosalind.db "SELECT email, datetime\(created_at, 'unixepoch'\) FROM users;")

Bash(sqlite3 open_rosalind.db "SELECT count\(*\) as users FROM users; SELECT count\(*\) as sessions FROM sessions; SELECT count\(*\) as messages FROM messages; SELECT count\(*\) as tasks FROM tasks;")
